description: Arena-only public competitor snapshots. Populated by the Arena coordinator so companies can observe public rival state after weekly advances.

columns.day: INTEGER — Simulation day when this public snapshot was recorded
columns.company_id: TEXT — Stable Arena company identifier (e.g., company_0)
columns.price_A: REAL — Public Plan A monthly price
columns.price_B: REAL — Public Plan B monthly price
columns.price_C: REAL — Public Plan C monthly price
columns.tier_A: INTEGER — Public Plan A model tier
columns.tier_B: INTEGER — Public Plan B model tier
columns.tier_C: INTEGER — Public Plan C model tier
columns.quota_A: INTEGER — Public Plan A usage quota
columns.quota_B: INTEGER — Public Plan B usage quota
columns.quota_C: INTEGER — Public Plan C usage quota
columns.public_total_subscribers: INTEGER — Public Arena subscriber count summary for this company at snapshot time
columns.public_subscribers_by_group_json: TEXT — JSON object of public subscriber counts by customer group
